examples: As he said, No redneck wants a dog that won’t bite.
The Redneck Games are held every year in Dublin, Georgia.
M: a redneck is someone from the countryside who lives a country lifestyle.
My own pants were always sagging down below my belly button, redneck-style, even with a belt.
Mr. COLEMAN: Oh, just based upon, you know, my friends who tend to have redneck attitudes.
